mentions.note: Caller bullish on ecosystem play (Red Fin, Mr. Cooper, Compass), asked if could double. Cramer says no—too many housing headwinds. Home Depot is one of his worst positions in travel trust. Don't be big in Rocket.
Stock vote on rate-cut timing; good earnings but down since. At $14 represents value. Rate-cut hopes re-emerging; do not give up on position.
Mortgage lender; play on Kevin Warsh rate cuts. Cramer sees no rate cuts coming due to oil inflation.
